name: Run AI voice outreach from Airtable with Bolna, Groq, Brevo and AiSensy

nodes.name: Airtable — Get Contacts
nodes.notes: Picks up: (1) fresh records where Call Status is empty, AND (2) records marked No Answer - 1 that were last called 3+ days ago. Skips records with no phone number.

nodes.name: Loop Over Colleges
nodes.notes: Processes one college at a time. Output [0] = current item. Output [1] = done signal (not connected — workflow ends cleanly when all records are processed).

nodes.name: Bolna.ai — Place Call
nodes.notes: Places outbound call via Bolna.ai to the coordinator's phone. PHONE FORMAT: Airtable must store numbers in international format e.g. +919876543210. Bolna returns a call_id used in the next step. Agent ID is already set.

nodes.name: Bolna — Get Call Status
nodes.notes: Fetches full call data from Bolna. Key fields used downstream: conversation_duration (to detect pickup) and transcript (for Claude analysis). IF THIS FAILS: Bolna might return 'id' instead of 'call_id' in the POST response — open this node and change call_id to id in the URL.

nodes.name: IF — Did They Pick Up?
nodes.notes: TRUE [0] = conversation_duration > 0 meaning someone spoke. FALSE [1] = null or 0 duration meaning no answer or busy. Number() safely converts null to 0.

nodes.name: IF — Interested?
nodes.notes: TRUE [0] = Claude said YES (coordinator is interested). FALSE [1] = Claude said NO. caseSensitive is false so YES / yes / Yes all match.

nodes.name: Brevo — Opportunity Email
nodes.notes: ACTION REQUIRED: Replace PASTE_YOUR_BREVO_API_KEY_HERE with your actual Brevo API key. Find it at: Brevo dashboard → Settings → SMTP and API → API Keys. It starts with xkeysib-

nodes.name: Brevo — Reassurance Email
nodes.notes: ACTION REQUIRED: Replace PASTE_YOUR_BREVO_API_KEY_HERE with your actual Brevo API key (same key as the Opportunity Email node).

nodes.name: IF — 2nd Attempt?
nodes.notes: Checks the original Airtable record's Call Status. TRUE [0] = Call Status was 'No Answer - 1' meaning this is the SECOND failed attempt → Dead Contact. FALSE [1] = Call Status was empty, this is the FIRST failed attempt → send email, mark No Answer - 1, retry in 3 days.

nodes.name: Brevo — No Answer Email
nodes.notes: Sent after FIRST failed attempt. Informs the coordinator we tried calling and will try again in a few days. ACTION REQUIRED: Replace PASTE_YOUR_BREVO_API_KEY_HERE.

nodes.name: Schedule — Daily 11AM IST
nodes.notes: Runs every day at 9:00 AM IST (3:30 AM UTC). To test manually, use the Execute Workflow button instead.

nodes.name: Groq — Analyze Transcript
nodes.notes: Uses Claude Haiku to read the Hindi/Hinglish/English transcript and return YES or NO. max_tokens is 10 because we only need one word back — keeps cost minimal (~$0.0001 per call analysis).

nodes.name: Wait - 180sec
nodes.notes: Waits 5 minutes for the call to complete before fetching the result. Adjust if your calls are consistently shorter or longer. Most calls in call history were 2-4 minutes.

parameters.content:
## Run AI voice outreach from Airtable with Bolna, Groq, Brevo and AiSensy

### How it works

This workflow automates AI voice outreach campaigns for lead generation. Every day at 11 AM IST, it pulls contacts from Airtable, calls each one using Bolna.ai voice agent, waits for the call to complete, then uses Groq to analyze the call transcript. Based on the analysis, contacts are categorized as Interested, Not Interested, No Answer, or Dead Contact. Each category gets a tailored follow-up email via Brevo and a WhatsApp message via AiSensy. Airtable is updated with the call outcome. No-answer contacts get a second attempt before being marked as dead.

### Outcome categories

- Interested: Opportunity email sent, WhatsApp message sent, Airtable updated
- Not Interested: Reassurance email sent, Airtable updated
- No Answer (1st attempt): Follow-up email sent, loops back for retry
- Dead Contact (2nd failed attempt): Dead contact email sent, Airtable updated

## Trigger and load contacts

Schedule Trigger runs daily at 11 AM IST. Airtable node pulls all contacts from your outreach table. Loop Over Colleges processes contacts one by one. Skip if Called Recently checks the last_called field and skips contacts called in the past 24 hours.

## Place call and wait for result

Bolna.ai Place Call triggers the AI voice agent to call the contact. Wait node pauses the workflow for 180 seconds (3 minutes) to allow the call to complete. Bolna Get Call Status fetches the call result including whether the contact picked up and the full transcript.

## Analyze transcript and route

IF Did They Pick Up checks if the call was answered. If yes, Groq Analyze Transcript sends the call transcript to Groq Llama 3.3 which determines if the contact showed interest. IF Interested routes to the appropriate email and Airtable update. If the call was not answered, IF 2nd Attempt checks whether this was the first or second try.

## Send follow-up emails and update Airtable

Four outcome branches each send a tailored Brevo email and update the contact status in Airtable. Interested contacts also receive a WhatsApp message via AiSensy. After each update, the workflow loops back to process the next contact in the batch.

## Setup Guide

### Step 1 - Airtable
1. Create an Airtable base with a contacts table
2. Required columns: name, phone, email, status, last_called, attempt_count
3. Get your Airtable personal access token from airtable.com/create/tokens
4. n8n: Credentials - Add - Airtable Token API - paste token - Save
5. Select your base and table in the Airtable Get node
6. Update the Airtable URLs in all four update nodes with your base and table IDs

### Step 2 - Bolna.ai Voice Agent
1. Create an AI voice agent at app.bolna.dev
2. Configure the agent script, voice, and phone number
3. Copy your Bolna API key
4. n8n: Credentials - Add - HTTP Header Auth - Name: Authorization, Value: Bearer YOUR_KEY
5. Replace YOUR_BOLNA_AGENT_ID in both Bolna nodes with your agent ID

### Step 3 - Groq API Key
1. console.groq.com - API Keys - Create
2. Replace YOUR_GROQ_API_KEY in the Groq Analyze Transcript node Authorization header

### Step 4 - Brevo Email
1. Get your Brevo API key from app.brevo.com - Settings - API Keys
2. Replace YOUR_BREVO_API_KEY in all four Brevo email nodes
3. Replace YOUR_SENDER_EMAIL with your verified Brevo sender address
4. Customize the email templates in each Brevo node body

### Step 5 - AiSensy WhatsApp
1. Get your API key from AiSensy dashboard
2. Replace YOUR_AISENSY_API_KEY in the WhatsApp msg node
3. Create and get approved a WhatsApp message template in AiSensy

### Step 6 - Test
1. Add 2-3 test contacts to Airtable
2. Click Test Workflow
3. Check Airtable for status updates and your email for Brevo messages
